scripts.release:version: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const argv=process.argv;const idx=argv.indexOf('--ver');const ver=idx>-1?argv[idx+1]:''; if(!ver){console.error('Missing --ver'); process.exit(1);} const files=[['packages/runtime/package.json', (p)=>{p.version=ver;}], ['packages/cli/package.json',(p)=>{p.version=ver; p.dependencies=p.dependencies||{}; p.dependencies['yapi-typed-runtime']='^'+ver;}]]; for(const [file,mut] of files){const abs=path.resolve(file); const json=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(abs,'utf8')); mut(json); fs.writeFileSync(abs, JSON.stringify(json,null,2)+'\n');}" --
